recommendations.title: The Addams Family 2
recommendations.overview: The Addams get tangled up in more wacky adventures and find themselves involved in hilarious run-ins with all sorts of unsuspecting characters.

recommendations.title: Sausage Party
recommendations.overview: Hot dog Frank leads a group of supermarket products on a quest to discover the truth about their existence and what really happens when they become chosen to leave the grocery store.

recommendations.director: Conrad Vernon, Kelly Asbury, Andrew Adamson

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted

recommendations.director: Conrad Vernon, Eric Darnell, Tom McGrath

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: The Grinch
recommendations.overview: The Grinch hatches a scheme to ruin Christmas when the residents of Whoville plan their annual holiday celebration.
